settings.privacy_policy:
## Privacy Policy for Your Company
_Effective Date: 07/11/2025_

## Introduction
Welcome to Dragpns Estate Pubs Limited! We are committed to protecting your privacy and complying with the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and Data Protection Act 2018. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our website (https://dragonpub.co.uk) or contact us.

## 1. Information We Collect
We may collect and process the following personal data:
- **Newsletter/Marketing:** Your email address and preferences if you subscribe.
- **Usage Data:** IP address, browser type, device info, pages visited, and analytics data (see 'Cookies and Tracking').

## 2. How We Use Your Information
We use your information to:
- Respond to your enquiries or requests
- Send newsletters and marketing communications (with your consent)
- Improve our website and services through analytics and feedback

## 3. Lawful Basis for Processing
We process your personal data where it is necessary for the performance of a contract, compliance with a legal obligation, or for our legitimate interests. For marketing, we rely on your consent, which you can withdraw at any time.

## 4. Data Sharing and Disclosure
We do not sell your data. We may share your information with:
- Trusted service providers (e.g., website hosting, analytics, email delivery) who must keep your data confidential
- Authorities, if required by law or to protect our rights

## 5. International Data Transfers
If your data is transferred outside the UK, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect it in accordance with UK data protection law.

## 6. Data Security
We use technical and organisational measures to protect your data, including HTTPS encryption and access controls. However, no system is completely secure.

## 7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience and analyse usage. See our Cookie Policy for details.
- We use Google Analytics for website usage analytics.
- We use Facebook Pixel for marketing analytics.
- Social sharing features may set cookies.

## 8. Your Rights
You have the right to:
- Access the personal data we hold about you
- Request corrections to your data
- Request deletion of your data, subject to legal requirements
- Object to or restrict processing
- Withdraw consent for marketing at any time
To exercise your rights, contact us at **bookings@dragonpub.co.uk**.

## 9. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page and the effective date updated.

## 10. Contact Us
If you have any questions or concerns about this policy or your data, contact us at **bookings@dragonpub.co.uk**.
settings.cookie_policy:
## Cookie Policy for Your Company
_Effective Date: 07/11/2025_

## Introduction
This Cookie Policy explains how Your Company uses cookies and similar technologies on our website (https://dragonpub.co.uk). By using our website, you agree to our use of cookies as described below.

## 1. What Are Cookies?
Cookies are small text files placed on your device to help websites function, improve user experience, and provide information to site owners.

## 2. How We Use Cookies
We use cookies to:
- Ensure website functionality and security
- Remember your preferences
- Analyse website traffic and usage patterns
- Use analytics services (Google Analytics) to understand visitor behaviour
- Use Facebook Pixel for marketing analytics
- Enable social sharing features

## 3. Types of Cookies We Use
- **Strictly Necessary Cookies:** Essential for website operation
- **Performance Cookies:** Collect information about how visitors use the site
- **Functionality Cookies:** Remember your settings and preferences

## 4. Third-Party Cookies
Some cookies may be set by third-party services such as analytics or embedded content. These are subject to their own privacy policies.

## 5. Managing Cookies
You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality. For more information, visit [www.aboutcookies.org](https://www.aboutcookies.org/).

## 6. Changes to This Cookie Policy
We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

## 7. Contact Us
If you have any questions about our use of cookies, contact us at **bookings@dragonpub.co.uk** or visit **https://dragonpub.co.uk**.
